_comment: Agent-to-role mapping for Valorant (as of patch 10.x / 2026)

Entry.description: Duelist role — high-risk first contact, aggressive positioning

Controller.description: Smoke and map control — enables team rotations

Initiator.description: Information and flash utility — enables entry

Sentinel.description: Defensive anchor — holds flanks and sites

IGL.description: In-Game Leader — assigned via external registry, not agent pick
IGL.note: IGL classification requires external team captain data. Never infer from agent pick alone.
